creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Martin Filla from comment #13)

Can you please also check the others?  Why are they in BUILD_DEPENDS and also in LIB_DEPENDS?  I don't get it.

You never explain yourself, which makes things harder.  It would be nice if you could actually explain your reasoning process when you do uncommon things instead of just changing them once I ask about them.

Also please test your port with all build-time only dependencies deinstalled to ensure that they aren't actually needed at runtime.  You can do so with poudriere testport -i by manually deleting the dependencies in the build jail.
